video_job.actor_prompt: Cinematic medium shot, Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, warm wood interior. Kaelen Ironheart, a masculine frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a bright scarf with a silver pin, presents a sealed quest parcel to Sora Mistfell, an androgynous guild crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron and brass tool belt. Kaelen holds the parcel with both hands, extending it toward Sora in a clear handoff motion. Lively guild background, soft warm anime lighting, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous guild hall shot, warm lighting. Sora Mistfell accepts the sealed quest parcel from Kaelen Ironheart’s hands. After the transfer, both characters perform a polite, slight bow to each other. The handoff is completed smoothly. Consistent character appearance and guild setting, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The content depicts a professional, non-sexual, cooperative interaction between two fantasy characters. No sensitive or prohibited content.

timeline_story.story_verb: completed a visible quest handoff with
timeline_story.selection_reason: Handing over the secured Twin Relic to the guild crafter for inspection and secure storage.
